title: Industrial Magic
description: Enjoy a Modded experience for everybody from technologies to magic and even exploration!
body:
# Industrial Magic

Industrial Magic is a mod pack that is made for SMP or solo.
The more you are, the more fun you have.

This ModPack is designed for every type of player.
Here's a few that will enjoy:
- Builder's
- Adventurer
- Engineer
- Mage
- Warrior

## The Builder
The Builder has access to a lot of decorative
blocks from Create and Macaw's Furniture.

## Adventurer
The adventurer has many places to explore, from the underground villages to
giant witch mansion to turn in a base and all of Yung Nick Yung structures.
They can explore the land with airplane, a drone, or even a barrage ballon!

## Engineer
The Engineer will have a blast in this modpack with the rotation of Create,
the diverse machines of immersive engineering and Mekanism to electrical power
with powah! Make train networks to complex belt system or even help the Mage in their witch craft with some automation.

## Mage
The mage can have multiple staff's and cast spells from scroll to brewing new potions
with the help of Irons Spells Book. With the help of an engineer, automate crafting of base potion for faster, more powerful potion even faster.

## Warrior
The warrior can use multiple weapons from the various mods provided and even 
a few magical items provided by the mage.
